name: 240W UFO High Bay Light AC 277-480V CCT 5000K
description: Built to deliver unmatched performance in high-voltage environments, the ZION LED USA 240W LED UFO High Bay Light offers powerful, energy-efficient illumination for large-scale facilities. Designed for AC 277-480V systems and featuring a robust black housing, this fixture is ideal for warehouses, factories, retail spaces, and gymnasiums that require high-output lighting with lasting reliability. Choose the ZION LED USA 240W LED UFO High Bay Light for high-performance, high-voltage lighting that meets the demands of today’s industrial and commercial spaces with efficiency and style.
short_desc: ZION LED USA 240W LED UFO High Bay Light – High Voltage, Maximum Brightness for Demanding Commercial & Industrial Applications. Key Features: High Voltage Operation: Supports AC 277-480V, ensuring compatibility with industrial and commercial power systems. Ultra-Bright Output: Delivers 240 watts of consistent, high-lumen illumination to enhance visibility in vast spaces. Daylight Precision: 5000K color temperature produces clean, natural white light for improved clarity and performance. Durable Construction: Engineered with high-quality materials and a sleek black finish for strength and aesthetic appeal. Energy Saving Design: Leverages advanced LED technology to cut energy costs and reduce maintenance frequency. Installation-Ready: User-friendly design simplifies setup, especially for high ceilings and open-plan environments. Indoor Rated: Ideal for indoor use in high bay applications with suitable IP protection for industrial settings. Perfect For: Warehouses – Delivers consistent, bright light to promote safety and operational efficiency. Factories – Supports precision work and industrial processes with reliable, glare-free illumination. Retail Spaces – Enhances visibility and customer experience in large commercial environments. Gymnasiums – Provides wide beam coverage ideal for sports courts, arenas, and fitness areas.
